title: Deepest Sword
description: Venture deep into the Cavern of Longing. Plunge your sword deep into the dragon's heart! How deep is your resolve?
author: https://cosmicadventuresquad.itch.io/deepest-sword

title: Help! No Brakes
description: Race through a series of levels without the option to brake! Can you do it?
author: https://edgarmendoza.itch.io/help-no-brake

title: Admin
description: The entire office forgot their passwords! Can you crack them?
author: https://jbodah.itch.io/admin-play

title: CaptchaWare
description: CaptchaWare is a game where you complete captchas in quick succession!
author: https://paperhatprojects.itch.io/captchaware

title: Slope
description: Slope Game is a fast-paced, 'endless runner' style game where you control a ball rolling down a never-ending slope.
author: https://mini-chow.itch.io/slope

title: Subway Surfers
description: Subway Surfers is a 2012 endless runner mobile game which is co-developed by Kiloo and SYBO Games
author: https://thirstythirsty3.itch.io/subway-surfers

title: Don't Stare
description: See how many rejections you can rack up in 20 seconds...
author: https://gabemcarvalho.itch.io/dont-stare

title: A dance of fire and ice
description: A Dance of Fire and Ice is a simple rhythm game. Press on every beat of the music to move in a line. This game is purely based on rhythm, so use your ears more than your sight.
author: https://fizzd.itch.io/a-dance-of-fire-and-ice
